languages.text: "Не стоит принимать столь поспешные решения. Диагностические ауспексы поведали мне, что жизненные токи раненой не содержат в себе скверны. Священное железо в ее теле работает полностью исправно, из чего я делаю вывод о незапятнанности этого индивида энтропией".

"One should not make such hasty decisions. Diagnostic auspexes have revealed to me that the victim's life currents harbour no corruption. The sacred iron within her body functions with complete efficacy; thus, this individual is untainted by entropy."
languages.original_text: "Не стоит принимать столь поспешные решения. Диагностические ауспексы поведали мне, что жизненные токи раненой не содержат в себе скверны. Священное железо в ее теле работает полностью исправно, из чего я делаю вывод о незапятнанности этого индивида энтропией".

traits.locale_text: "One should not make such hasty decisions. Diagnostic auspexes have revealed to me that the victim's life currents harbour no taint. The sacred iron within her body functions with complete efficacy; thus, this individual is untainted by entropy."

"One should not make such hasty decisions. Diagnostic auspexes have revealed to me that the victim's life currents harbour no corruption. The sacred iron within her body functions with complete efficacy; thus, this individual is untainted by entropy."

languages.text: «Las decisiones hay que tomarlas con calma. El aúspex de diagnóstico revela que las corrientes vitales de la víctima no albergan corrupción. El hierro sagrado de su cuerpo funciona plenamente, por lo que esta persona está libre de entropía».
languages.original_text: "One should not make such hasty decisions. Diagnostic auspexes have revealed to me that the victim's life currents harbour no corruption. The sacred iron within her body functions with complete efficacy; thus, this individual is untainted by entropy."

traits.locale_text: «Las decisiones hay que tomarlas con calma. El aúspex de diagnóstico revela que las corrientes vitales de la víctima no albergan corrupción. El hierro sagrado de su cuerpo funciona plenamente, por lo que esta persona está libre de entropía».

languages.text: “这样的决定未免太过草率。诊断鸟卜仪已经证明，那受害者的生命脉流中不存在腐化的迹象。她体内圣铁的运转完全正常。因此，该个体并未受到熵的玷污。”
languages.original_text: "One should not make such hasty decisions. Diagnostic auspexes have revealed to me that the victim's life currents harbour no corruption. The sacred iron within her body functions with complete efficacy; thus, this individual is untainted by entropy."

traits.locale_text: “这样的决定未免太过草率。诊断鸟卜仪已经证明，那受害者的生命脉流中不存在腐化的迹象。她体内圣铁的运转完全正常。因此，该个体并未受到熵的玷污。”

languages.text: "Wir sollten keine so voreiligen Schlüsse ziehen. Die Diagnoseauspizien haben mir offenbart, dass den Lebensströmen des Opfers keine Verderbnis innewohnt. Das heilige Eisen in ihrem Körper funktioniert perfekt. Dieses Individuum ist also nicht mit Entropie befleckt."
languages.original_text: "One should not make such hasty decisions. Diagnostic auspexes have revealed to me that the victim's life currents harbour no corruption. The sacred iron within her body functions with complete efficacy; thus, this individual is untainted by entropy."

traits.locale_text: "Wir sollten keine so voreiligen Schlüsse ziehen. Die Diagnoseauspizien haben mir offenbart, dass den Lebensströmen des Opfers keine Verderbnis innewohnt. Das heilige Eisen in ihrem Körper funktioniert perfekt. Dieses Individuum ist also nicht mit Entropie befleckt."

languages.text: « On devrait toujours se garder de prendre des décisions hâtives. Les auspex de diagnostic indiquent que les flux vitaux de la victime sont exempts de corruption. Le fer sacré intégré à son organisme fonctionne parfaitement, et nous pouvons en conclure que cet individu n'est pas atteint d'entropie. »
languages.original_text: "One should not make such hasty decisions. Diagnostic auspexes have revealed to me that the victim's life currents harbour no corruption. The sacred iron within her body functions with complete efficacy; thus, this individual is untainted by entropy."

traits.locale_text: « On devrait toujours se garder de prendre des décisions hâtives. Les auspex de diagnostic indiquent que les flux vitaux de la victime sont exempts de corruption. Le fer sacré intégré à son organisme fonctionne parfaitement, et nous pouvons en conclure que cet individu n'est pas atteint d'entropie. »

languages.text: "Böyle aceleci kararlar verilmemeli. Teşhis uzgörenleri, kurbanın yaşam akıntılarında hiçbir yozlaşma olmadığını bana gösterdi. Bedenindeki kutsal demir tam bir verimlilikle işliyor. Dolayısıyla bu birey, entropiyle lekelenmemiş."
languages.original_text: "One should not make such hasty decisions. Diagnostic auspexes have revealed to me that the victim's life currents harbour no corruption. The sacred iron within her body functions with complete efficacy; thus, this individual is untainted by entropy."

traits.locale_text: "Böyle aceleci kararlar verilmemeli. Teşhis uzgörenleri, kurbanın yaşam akıntılarında hiçbir yozlaşma olmadığını bana gösterdi. Bedenindeki kutsal demir tam bir verimlilikle işliyor. Dolayısıyla bu birey, entropiyle lekelenmemiş."

languages.text: 「急な判断は良くない。診断の奥で、その人の生命のエネルギーは汚染されていない。彼女の体内の聖なる鉄は完全に機能している。この人はエントロピーに汚染されていない。」
languages.original_text: "One should not make such hasty decisions. Diagnostic auspexes have revealed to me that the victim's life currents harbour no corruption. The sacred iron within her body functions with complete efficacy; thus, this individual is untainted by entropy."
